sections.paragraph: quadril. derived from Piel of the verb כָּסַם, which see, for כִּסֵּם (see כָּרְסֵא , and under the letter ), to cut off, to devour, to depasture, to lay waste, as a wild boar a vineyard, Psa 80:14. (Arabic كرسم to cut off, to corrode, to depasture, to gnaw, to devour; Chald. קַרְסֵם to devour, depasture, as a locust.)
